name: Turkey Squares
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Finely diced leftover cooked turkey
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the first nine ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Add salt and pepper to taste.
3. Transfer the mixture into a lightly buttered baking dish.
4. Place the baking dish into a larger oven-proof dish.
5. Pour water into the larger dish until it reaches a depth of 1/2 inch.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 50-60 minutes.
7. Remove from the oven and cut into squares.
8. Serve with heated turkey gravy.
